home.hero_title_bn_primary: চাপ বাড়ার আগেই plan করে ফেলুন।
home.hero_subtitle: The complete NZ settlement planner for Bangladeshi students — know your budget, city, and survival window before you land.
home.hero_subtitle_bn: নিউজিল্যান্ডে যেতে চাওয়া বাংলাদেশী ছাত্রদের জন্য সহজ planning space। শহর বেছে নিন, বাস্তব খরচ দেখুন, আর জীবনটা কেমন হতে পারে তা বুঝুন।
home.step1_desc: Choose who you're planning for — Solo, Couple, or Family.
home.step2_desc: Auckland, Wellington, Christchurch, Hamilton, or Dunedin.
home.step3_desc: See exactly how long your savings will last — in BDT and NZD.
home.flag_badge: Helping Bangladeshis settle in New Zealand
home.tools_subtitle: These pages extend the current planner with the missing Phase 1 guidance surface — practical, browsable, and shaped to the same design system.
home.mascot_title: What this app is built for.
home.mascot_copy: KiwiDream BD is built by Joy & Priota — two Bangladeshi students who lived the exact uncertainty this platform solves. Phase 1 focuses on budget clarity, city comparison, and move readiness for students heading to New Zealand.
home.talk_copy: KiwiDream BD is a self-service journey OS for Bangladeshi students planning New Zealand study life. It focuses on budget clarity, city comparison, living fund readiness, essentials, and practical pre-departure decisions.
home.coffee_copy: Donation support is being prepared. This will help keep student guides, cost data, and planning tools updated for the community.
home.contact_copy: Have a suggestion, correction, or student-life question? This message space is being prepared so KiwiDream BD can listen and improve from real student needs.
home.contact_message_placeholder: Tell us what would help you plan better
home.contact_soon: Email sending is coming soon. For now, this preview shows how the contact experience will feel.
home.donation_title: Help us keep the guides alive.
home.donation_copy: KiwiDream BD is built with care for students who need clear, practical information. A small donation helps enrich content, keep costs updated, and support this volunteer effort.
home.donation_modal_copy: KiwiDream BD is built with care for students who need clear, practical information. A small donation helps enrich content, keep costs updated, and support this volunteer effort.

planner.lifestyle_subprompt: Pick your situation — we'll load the right cost template automatically.
planner.city_prompt: Which city are you moving to?
planner.city_subprompt: Select a city to see suburb-level cost estimates.
planner.day1_subtitle: Liquid cash needed before you can move in
planner.fund_disclaimer: Enter your savings for accommodation and living costs only. Do not include tuition fees or money reserved for other purposes.
planner.fund_board_subtitle: This is the calm-check layer of the planner. Put in the money you can actually carry into the move, then see how long that fund really lasts.
planner.fund_empty_title: Your runway preview will appear here
planner.enter_fund_prompt: Enter your living fund above to see your survival window
planner.monthly_board_subtitle: Tune each category like a game loadout. The goal is not perfection. The goal is a monthly budget you can actually live with.
planner.moving_board_subtitle: Treat this like your launch checklist. Every line can change, every amount is editable, and nothing is locked to rent or any automatic formula.
planner.chart_modal_subtitle: Use this as a quick visual check. If one slice feels too dominant, that is usually the first clue that the plan needs rebalancing.
planner.chart_empty_subtitle: Add a few monthly living categories first.

dashboard.preview_cta: Sign in to build your real plan
dashboard.timeline_subtitle: When to buy what after you land
dashboard.home_title_auth: {{name}}, your NZ move plan is here.
dashboard.home_title_guest: A clean preview of what your planning dashboard keeps together.
dashboard.home_copy_auth: Track only the essentials: monthly budget, arrival cash, readiness, saved plans, and the next action that matters.
dashboard.home_copy_guest: Use this preview to understand the dashboard shape. Sign in when you want your real saved plan and checklist progress here.
dashboard.readiness_with_fund: Your current living fund is around {{amount}}. Keep tuning the plan until the runway feels calm.
dashboard.readiness_empty: Add your living fund in the planner to turn this from demo readiness into your own number.
dashboard.next_copy: These are the only shortcuts that belong here right now: budget, checklist, city choice, and NZ essentials.
dashboard.action_budget_copy: Tune monthly costs, move cost, and living fund.
dashboard.action_checklist_copy: Finish documents, money, health, and arrival tasks.
dashboard.action_compare_copy: Compare rent, transport, groceries, and student fit.
dashboard.action_essentials_copy: Read IRD, banking, shopping, health, and community basics.
dashboard.plan_switch_copy: Pick a saved plan from the dropdown and the dashboard updates to that plan's budget, readiness, and charts.

guide.title: NZ Essentials for BD Students
guide.subtitle: Everything you need to know before and after you land — written for Bangladeshis.

auth.why_1: Save your budget plan and return later without rebuilding everything.
auth.why_2: Keep your currency, language, and profile context in one place.
auth.why_3: Unlock your personal dashboard and future checklist progress.
auth.signin_title: Sign in to save your planning progress
auth.signin_subtitle: This is a frontend-only demo for now, so every button and input is intentionally low-friction.
auth.signup_subtitle: Try the full sign-up UX now. No backend is connected yet, so this is a demo flow.
auth.forgot_subtitle: Enter any email and continue. This screen is UX-only for now.
auth.reset_subtitle: This step is simulated for the current frontend phase.
auth.more_title_guest: Settings, about, and quick account access
auth.more_subtitle_guest: Use this space to switch language or currency from anywhere, even before signing in.
auth.more_subtitle_signedin: Keep your planning preferences easy to reach without adding extra mobile navigation clutter.
auth.settings_subtitle: Preferences that shape your planning view
auth.forgot_success: Demo reset link sent. In the real flow, the user would receive an email here.
auth.reset_note: Any value is accepted in this demo flow.
auth.language_help: Choose the interface language you want to use
auth.currency_help: All planner amounts will follow this currency
auth.dashboard_quick_copy: Jump back to your planning overview.
auth.guest_card_copy: You can still switch language and currency from this page while reading guides, comparing cities, or checking the planner. Sign in only when you want to save personal progress.
auth.profile_guest_copy: Once the user signs in, this space becomes their editable profile with saved account details and dashboard access.
auth.about_heading: What this app is built for
auth.about_copy: KiwiDream BD is designed as a student-side planning space for Bangladeshi students moving to New Zealand. Keep the mobile shell simple, and keep the important preferences in one predictable place.
auth.dev_team_alt: Joy and Priota, the KiwiDream BD developer team
auth.dev_team_caption: Made with love from Joy & Priota 💚
auth.save_plan_title: Keep this version in your dashboard
auth.save_plan_signedout: Sign in first to save this plan to your dashboard.
auth.save_plan_signedin: You are signed in. Your saved plans so far: {{count}}.
auth.plan_snapshot: Current snapshot: NZD {{monthly}} monthly · {{runway}} months runway

tools.checklist_desc: Keep track of the must-do items before you fly.
tools.compare_desc: View rent, transport, groceries, and student suburb signals side by side.
tools.jobs_desc: See common student work types, hourly rates, and an earnings calculator.
tools.essentials_desc: Banking, IRD, shopping, health, and community basics in one place.
tools.converter_desc: Convert BDT to NZD and understand what the amount really means.

footer.copyright: © 2026 KiwiDream BD. Built for Bangladeshi students moving to New Zealand.
